reviews.text: My family members I have used Sam as a reliable attorney for many years and just want to say he is caring and reliable , honest to the tee. If your looking for an attorney Sam your guy . Thank you again for your help
I called Eisenberg Law group with an auto accident question I had. Katie was very Knowledgeable and I would highly recommend them for any personal injury needs or assistance

Eisenberg’s office was more than helpful when it came to handling my case. I got into an auto accident and was helpless at first because my insurance wouldn’t do anything. Eisenberg not only repaired my car, paid for my therapy, but also got me a fair settlement for my case. They were super thorough and transparent which is always important. Couldn’t have asked for anyone better. Highly recommend trusting them and their team

Jason and team were great to me and did an amazing job in helping me get my car fixed. I can honestly say I got the help and attention needed, as well as helping me with a chiropractor. My car got fixed in no time, even with covid going on everything was resolved in a timely matter , once again thank you for everything !! I highly recommend:D
My experience with Jason has been so helpful, honest with my cases. He was very professional , precised in giving his answers to my questions
U guys did a beautiful job thank ugod bleed u all

Unfortunate events brought me to the doorstep of Gary and Jason and I never looked back because they ALWAYS gave me something to look forward to. It was HOPE. In this day and age it's a challenge to trust. You can ALWAYS TRUST Gary and Jason. Men with integrity, who are more than willing to go the extra mile, and KNOW THE LAW THAT PROTECTS YOU!!! It's been years now and they are still my attorney's and they have helped other family members.

The law firm is very profesional .
Jason Eisenberg will work extremely hard for you. Everything was explained from beginning to end. Every question I asked was answered in a timely manner.
I am very happy to have the Eisenberg firm on my side. Best lawyers you could ask for.

Gary and Jason are the best attorneys in the business! They were always quick to respond to my calls and were always there for me throughout the process. They are honest, hardworking and very knowledgeable. I was really happy with the results and the process of my case!

I would refer Gary & Jason to all my friends and family.
They are honest, reliable and keep you informed during the entire process of your case. They will take the time to ask questions and make sure they do everything they can to fight for you. I wouldn't want anyone but them to represent myself, my friends or family. Give them a call!
Thank you Gary & Jason for always helping me and having my best interest.

Very Professional
Extremely Knowledgeable
Took times to listen and very helpful in all details
Always follow up to give updates
Best in town
The Eisenberg Law Group was an amazing experience for me. They handled everything with great professionalism and in a timely manner ! I highly recommend them over any other lawyers out there !!

This is the most exceptional law firm I have ever dealt with. I had the pleasure of working with Jason, who was able to calm me down when I was quite possibly, frantic. Going through his law firm put me at ease because I knew that they were going to take care of me. He was always there when I needed him. He was never too busy to answer the simplest of questions, we were able to settle on a more than reasonable deal, and he did it with keeping his morals ethics and integrity intact. I would recommend this law firm to all my friends and anyone reading this review. Do you self a favor and give them a call If you find yourself in need of a personal injury lawyer. Thanks again Jason!
The attorneys at Eisenberg Law Group are the most honest, fair and hardworking attorneys out there. They are easy to communicate with and they are extremely knowledgeable. I highly recommend them!
After my experience I wouldn’t use anybody else!

Eisenberg Law Group took better care of me than I could have ever imagined. After I wrecked my new motorcycle in a devastating accident, I didn’t think I’d ever recover mentally, physically, and financially. A few months later and I am in a better position than before. EGL fought for me until I recovered the full extent of my damages and then some. I could not recommend them more highly.

Very professional, honest attorney who has been in practice for decades. Mr. Eisenberg is really well connected and was feared by the defendants attorney which helped me achieve a much higher settlement than I could have dreamed of. No brainer choice for personal injury law. He actually cares about the case and you aren’t just a number in a deli meat line like many other firms! Thank you again for everything!!!
Great, hard-working attorneys who we regularly refer cases to. I trust Gary and Jason wholeheartedly.
Working with the Eisenberg law firm was a great decision. Their professional nature and good communication was second to none. I highly recommend using their services. A+

Mr. Kelley represented me in a wrongful death lawsuit. After I was deposed, I thought that the lawsuit was lost and that I would have to pay. But to my surprise he won a significant settlement in my behalf. I want to commend him and his staff on the professionalism, knowledge of the law and incredible mastery of the legal process. I would highly recommend his firm to anyone needing a top notch lawyer firm
I highly recommend him. Him and his staff are very helpful and professional. I hope I will never have to use him again but if I ever do need an attorney I would definitely use him again.
Robert  Kelley’s Law firm worked very hard for me and I’m so grateful
Can't recommend Wells Law highly enough! Professional, knowledgeable, empathetic, resourceful, and honest. Hard to come by these days! I feel incredibly lucky and grateful to have found them.

It was a pleasure to work with Randy and Natali at Wells Law. I had never needed a personal injury lawyer before and was not sure what to expect. They were very friendly, explained each step of the process while answering questions along the way. Randy is very knowledgeable in personal injury and understands realistic outcomes for his clients. In addition, had I not gone to Wells, the site of the accident would probably not be corrected as someone previous had already reported the site. (An acquaintance convinced me to at least have an initial conversation with Randy otherwise, I would not have sought out legal advice.) Within a short time of hiring Wells law, the site where the injury occurred, had been corrected. This is truly what a personal injury lawyer like Randy is all about, correcting a hazard! A huge thanks to Randy and Natali for their dedication and patience to clients!
Randy Wells, attorney, is the best!

Upon receiving a recommendation, and after winning my initial confidence in person, I chose Randy Wells to represent me in a personal injury case.   I didn't have to do anything during the entire process.  Randy took over, made/took the calls, filed the paperwork, etc., so I could do the doctor appointments, treatments and healing.  He kept me apprised of the progress via regular emails and phone calls.   I was more than pleased, actually surprised, by the final result, and can highly commend him to others, due to his valuable experience, knowledge and skills.
Highly recommend using Randy from Wells Law. Would refer to anyone in need. Great communication, great service, and great  results!

I chose to hire Randy for an auto accident that I was in. I was getting no help from the company that rear-ended me and my insurance was unfortunately not being very helpful either. Randy took care of everything, he sent me to specialists who treated my injuries, and he updated me regularly.
I am more than happy with the settlement that he was able to negotiate for me. I definitely recommend him to anyone who needs legal help.

I couldn’t be happier having chosen Randy as my attorney to represent me in my automotive personal injury case. He is knowledgeable, friendly, and compassionate—and he truly cares about his clients. He worked very diligently on my case, and he settled it with more compensation than I had hoped for. It cannot be overstated how grateful I am to have had him as my legal counsel. Thank you so much Randy!
Wells Law. Randy is a great attorney! He really went out of his way to get my case settled. Thank you Randy and your team.

Amazing experiance. It was so reassuring after the trauma of my accident to have a lawyer with compassion willing to fight for me. He won my case and I walked away with my expectations exceeded! I will be recommending him to everyone I meet who needs representation in a similar situation. 10/10 👌
The process from start to finish was smooth.  There was great communication!

I consulted Randy regarding an auto accident. It was very easy to speak to Randy. Randy investigated the information I had and communicated the expectations and steps to take. I felt I was in very good hands and trusted his judgment.

I am very happy with the outcome. A wonderful and caring office to work with.

Randy Wells is kind , considerate and caring lawyer.  My case was due to a five car accident and i was in the middle.  My shoulder and neck had been injured.  He took care of everything for me.  Which released me of a lot of stress.  I have referred him to my friends as I had been referred by a good friend.   I highly recommend this man to get the job done right and very honestly.   Sincerely  Elleanor  Ramirez.

Randy Wells and his Wells Law team took care of everything. They stayed in contact with me, were always responsive and considerate. The entire process from start to finish was as stress free as could be. They allowed me to focus on my PT and recovery with having to worry about the paperwork.

Absolutely amazing to work with! Randy is a real human being who cares about his clients. He made us comfortable in a very stressful situation. I never felt coerced to be dishonest during my wrongful termination case. All of my goals and objectives were met throughout the process. If you are looking for an attorney, definitely go with Wells Law!!

Randy Wells and his staff are nothing but a class act. Mr. Wells guided me through the entire process, thoroughly investigated both sides of the case and properly managed my expectations. They are a team with integrity, conscience and work from a very strong moral principle. Communication could not have been more clear with easy access to Mr. Wells and staff and prompt follow up and reminders from them to me. The end result was fantastic and I am very grateful to Mr. Wells and his staff.

I had a free consultation over the phone with Randy about a lawsuit and he gave me great advice along the way until the lawsuit was dismissed. I highly recommend Randy to anyone who needs legal assistance.

Mr. Wells was extremely helpful in my case. I've never been in an accident and was very unsure of the legal process of this situation. Mr. Wells communicated all the steps and processes clearly to me and was very transparent about all the aspects. He made me feel reassured and confident.

Awesome Attorney, Highly Recommend
Randy Wells was incredible at helping me out with my injuries from a fall in a store. Randy treated me with great professionalism and kept me up to date and explained anything and everything that I needed to know about my case, and I felt very taken care of the whole time. Thanks to Randy we were able to arbitrate a settlement that I was very happy with. Randy's receptionist Lani is so pleasant and soft spoken, she's always helpful, great customer service skills.  I will definitely come back if I ever find myself in need of attorney services in the future, it is a definite five stars out of five for me!  I would highly recommend his services to anyone looking for help with legal issues!

My mother and I were involved in a rear end car accident while we were at a complete stop where I suffered back injuries and my truck was a total loss after dealing with the insurance company. I was told that I should hire an accident attorney as soon as possible which is stressful and scary especially if you've never been in this situation before. Suddenly, everyone knows someone that might be able to help you. I was not confident in having to blindly search for an attorney even though I knew it was in mine and my mothers best interest to hire a professional in this situation. I then found Randy through a long time friend whom I hadn't seen in many years. After meeting up and talking,  I am extremely happy we chose to go with Randy for many reasons. He is extremely personable, knowledgeable, professional, helpful, kind, generous and the thing that sealed the deal for us was the fact that he is a man of faith which is extremely important to us. He would keep us heavily involved in every aspect of our case and goes above and beyond to make you feel comfortable and confident with his services. Randy was a great communicator and always kept in touch and let us know what was happening or just to simply check up on us to see how we were feeling. He is a genuine man with great integrity which is also very important and rare especially in the field of law. Randy set us at ease in a very long and stressful time. Not only did I walk away with a settlement I was happy with, I felt like I also walk away with a friend. Yes, I would HIGHLY recommend Wells Law if you are in a similar situation of needing someone to represent you in an accident case. I say this with pure honesty, it was the best decision I have made being in this daunting and stressful situation after a car accident.

I had a bad fall at work and was referred to Wells Law. Randy did impeccable due diligence and took my case.  He remained responsive to my phone calls and his office personnel were very professional and friendly. Randy listened to me and gave me great advice and helped me 100% along the way. Ultimately, we arbitrated a settlement and I was satisfied.  I highly recommend Randy Wells if you have a need for a personal injury lawyer. He is honest, hard-working, professional and caring. A solid character; you will be pleased with his work on your case.

When I was involved in an auto accident I was very grateful Randy Wells took my case.  My car was totaled and I was hurt.  Mr. Wells was extremely knowledgeable about the issues at hand and was one step ahead of opposing counsel.  He was diligent and aggressive in negotiating and resolved my case with excellent compensation.  Randy Wells shows he cares about his clients and their welfare.  His genuine care and best interest for me will never be forgotten.  I highly recommend him.

I used Randy Wells as my attorney and I am so happy with his services. He wasn’t pushy and was warm but straightforward. When I was in search of an attorney, I interviewed a few and felt like Randy was the one most suited for me in terms of value, professionalism, work ethic, and abilities. We met in person about 3 times in the 1.5 years of service he provided me but was always readily available through email and phone. His recommendations were solid and he was able to achieve a number I was happy with in my claim. Being in a car accident and getting a lawyer is a scary thing IMO and Randy made me feel at ease. I trusted him and his firm and I believe he’s as genuine as it will get when it comes to an attorney. I hope you never need a lawyer but when unfortunate circumstances arises, I high recommend him and his services. We hope to never have to use him again but you can bet, if we do, we’ll come knocking!

Christopher Leatart writes:

Randy Wells is the best attorney in Ventura County. He took my case at the last minute after another firm wouldn’t even return my calls. In an extremely short period of time he educated me on every aspect of my case, made certain I was thoroughly prepared by obtaining all the necessary documents pertinent to my case, and drove from Ojai to Glendale to be there to represent me at my hearing. He was always approachable and available to answer any of my many questions day or night through calls at his office or in emails after hours, and constantly kept me informed with daily updates on my case. Randy’s professionalism and personalized attention to detail helped me to win my case and if not for him I would have lost all of my medical insurance benefits and the means to pay for my continuing cancer treatments and extremely expensive daily medications. When the chips are down and the odds are stacked against you; Randy is the one you want in your corner fighting for you! Randy Wells Esq. is the only attorney I could count on for legal advice on two separate cases and the only one I trust to come in at the last minute and hit the winning shot at the buzzer!

Randy Wells is the lawyer you need  when it comes to personal injury cases.  He's efficient, caring and  professional.   He has helped me in every step of my injuries and provides the knowledge and expertise that I needed. I highly recommend his firm.
One, if not the best lawyer in the county
EXCELLENT ATTORNEY
RESPECTED IN ITS FIELD 5 STARS
BESIDES ALL THE COMMENTS, MR MARTINEZ IS TOP OF THE LINE ATTORNEY,  YOU CAN'T BLAME HIS STAFF,  MANUEL WILL REPRESENT YOU 100 PCT 5 🌟

Mr.martinez is a nice man but dosen't tell you how your case is going goes on vacation dosen't tell you and let's you deal with those so called secretaries who are not professional  nor do they know what they are doing they act like little children when talked to, I told him and he just brushed it off maybe he can't afford professional staff because when I was there they were talking about how he gave Maria a dollar and asked her to get water and an ice cream for all three and she was taking trash about him, don't go there go to bar association to get a good lawyer.
Good attorney, but his staff of girls are a little brain damaged
Great attorney, but yes the girls are rude and very uneducated
Excellent
Soooooooooooooo rude. Do not go here!!!!!! The attorney and Jeanette Zaragoza and the other two girls in the office are extremely rude and will not help you whatsoever!!!!!
Great attorney, hire her.

Christina is great , always let’s me know what’s going before hand and she’s a hard working dedicated lawyer as she has been with my case , I can’t thank you enough for all the time and energy you have spent helping me and finding the best solution , Christina is highly recommended by me and friends , call her she will get the job done , thanks again Christina . Two thumbs up 👍🏻👍🏻

I was referred to Christina for some legal issues I had.  She was so knowledgeable and helped navigate through the process.  I highly recommend meeting with her for any help you may need.  She was very responsive to my calls and emails.  She spent the time needed to hear me out and to give me her professional opinion and advice.  I am grateful for the hard work she did for me.  Thank you Christina!!

I was referred by a close friend to Christina for a legal matter. She was the absolute best. She is a great at what she does. She always promptly replies to questions, & explains everything thoroughly, & clearly. She did an exceptional job at helping me through my matter, and is very knowledgeable, kind, patient, & friendly. I would refer anyone who needs her type of legal expertise, in a heartbeat. She did an amazing, & professional job for me, & I am forever grateful. She is the best! Thank you Christina!

I can’t say enough good things about Christina...I was that mother that received the dreaded phone call from my son “I’m in jail”! As a mother it’s a very helpless position to be in. My husband helped me keep my bearings together and said we have to call Christina! We called and immediately I felt she had our back! She was calm collected professional and fierce! She’s prompt, communication was always there. Everything you want in a situation like this! She guided us through the whole process. Represented my son and pulled him through this nightmare...thank you Christina! I’m glad my husband knew exactly who to go to and will always be the lawyer I will refer to!

Christina truly is YOUR Ventura County Lawyer because she goes out of her way to assist YOU.
Called her to assist a member of my family and she followed up right away with lots of compassion. She truly cares!
I spoke with Christina about an issue that I had,  over the phone. She is a wealth of knowledge and an asset to anyone in need of her services. Could not recommend her more.

I have referred several clients and friends to Christina for civil and criminal law cases. She has helped them each time providing personal and effective legal services. They were all very happy and I am happy to know that anyone that goes to her is in good hands.

Michael Martin and Michael Pellegrini helped us win a construction defect mediation against a faulty roof installation done by August roofing. Michael's did a great job and we would hire them again without hesitation. You can feel confident going with this firm.

We have had a great experience working with this firm for both construction and employment law matters. Their team is extremely knowledgeable, responsive, and always provides clear, practical guidance.

A special thank you to Michael Martin, who has helped us for many years with construction law matters. His expertise, responsiveness, and practical advice have been invaluable to our business. The entire team is professional and a pleasure to work with. Highly recommend.

We want to commend and thank our attorneys James Perero and Sheri Valley of Myers Widders Gibson Jones & Feingold LLP in Ventura.  They have been very helpful advocates during a difficult time and complicated situation.  They proved to be an invaluable resource in a legal matter involving our auto insurance company which initially refused to meet their obligations for an accident that resulted in a personal injury. They handled our case with exceptional competency, expertise, and professionalism. We greatly appreciate their support and highly recommend their services.

Jason Knight is hands down the best attorney I have ever worked with. He's very bright, knowledgeable, communicative and knows how to get things completed in a timely manner. He far exceeded my expectations at every level. Thank you!

I had the LUCKY opportunity to do my trust with this is amazing professional,  kind , smart firm  Jason Knight from Myers Widders,Gibson,&Feingold  L.L.P. , And Michael M. To do my trust, it was easy , safe comfortable questions resolve , and piece of mind, I highly recommend them 100++++++++, thank u so much for the piece of mind. I have to mention Michael Meyer the legal assistant , she’s incredible helpful , and understands your case so the case goes very smooth and easy, thank u for your help dear Michael.-

Firstly, I need to state this was my 2nd hiring of this law firm. I first hired them in 2015 to handle my parents’ property held in trust. A family member was holding the property hostage essentially, and I ran out of money; therefore, I had to drop the lawsuit. Fast forward 7 years later, after the unexpected passing of my brother, and I re-hired the law firm with the recommendation of working with Sasha Collins, and Cari Potts……both respected in the courts and held in high esteem by their colleagues. These attorneys did not disappoint.
My other brother (co-trustee) and I didn’t always know what questions to ask, so it’s important to research that on your own as much as you can before starting.
Both Ms Collins, and Ms Potts answered our questions thoughtfully, and based on the law. Unfortunately, my brother and I were dealing with a very unhealthy family system, and that is not something attorneys are paid to address. That being said, it was extremely stressful interpersonally within the family. At times, my brother and I felt we had to nudge the attorneys to be more aggressive in their presentation to the judge, which they did, albeit reluctantly at times. That would be my one criticism, along with the attorneys’ paralegal(s) oftentimes not having correct information, eg. I missed several calls because the paralegal was using an outdated number despite my having given them updated info when we signed the legal contract; along with, getting beneficiary info incorrect more than once. But, it was remedied by the attorneys.
It was a lengthy journey, approximately 2 years (?) and the attorneys had given us an accurate timeline.
I would highly recommend this law firm, and either of these attorneys, Ms. Sasha Collins and Ms. Cari Potts. Our case was problematic from the onset, and they handled it with knowledge, grace, and expertise.
Thank You Both.

⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️
I’m deeply appreciative of Attorney Erik Feingold for his exceptional handling of my Thomas Fire settlement. His professionalism, attention to detail, and genuine care made a complex process smooth and successful. Truly first-class representation — I highly recommend him!
Jason Knight and Michael White are the best. They were both very patient and accommodating.
My husband and I were threatened legally over a contract dispute. Eric Feingold responded to our inquiries quickly and assuaged all of our fears. Can’t recommend enough.

Erik Feingold is, far and away, the best law professional I've gotten to work with. When unfortunate circumstances arose for my family and me, he was instrumental in protecting us. I give Erik my highest possible professional recommendation.

Working through our Stock Purchase project (including its associated NDA and Due Diligence Agreements) with Jacquelyn's team at MW was an absolute joy.  She handled every odd and complex turn in a timely manner both beautifully and professionally, providing helpful suggestions as needed throughout.

Her patience in navigating us successfully toward our end-game sale was impressive, truly needed, and enormously appreciated!

Sasha Collins, my attorney and her assistant Michael were not only professional but very warm and caring.  They made the process of estate planning straight-forward and easy.  They really listened, made suggestions and gave me what I wanted and needed.  All of my documents were filed in one binder, all labeled, and copies were sent digitally as well.  I am very satisfied with their work, which Is excellent by anyone's standards.

After losing our home in the Mountain Fire, Erik Feingold was an invaluable resource for assisting us in navigating complicated issues at a very difficult time. Beyond being an expert civil litigator, he is able to give wise and thoughtful advice. I have referred several friends to him for property and insurance litigation matters and every time, I hear back that they are as grateful as I have been to have him on their side.

I am grateful for the legal counsel I’ve received from MWGJ&F over the past few years.
Ms. Sasha Collins helped me navigate the trust administration of my parent’s estate, including a petition to the court to set up accommodations for my disabled brother. I had switched over to Ms. Collins after the first firm I consulted had been unsupportive and unwilling to help me carry out my parents’ wishes because the request was complicated. Sasha stepped in and made all the difference during a difficult transition.
Most recently, I turned to Ms. Jacquelyn Ruffin to help me set up my first LLC, review lease documents, and draft a sublease for my tenants. She listened to my priorities, gave solid advice, protected my interests, and helped me understand the process. She also kept an eye on my budget and informed me of her hours so I could best manage my startup budget.
Both attorneys demonstrated great communication skills, integrity, compassion, and attention to the needs of their clients. I highly recommend them and would look to the same firm for other areas of law I may need in the future.

Steven Lee, ESQ has assisted me twice over the last decade regarding disputes over monies owed after leaving two different organizations.  His approach, advice, and preparedness has helped me recover those monies plus penalties.  I would recommend Steven to those looking to recover any lost wages, bonuses, commissions, or other.

Had the pleasure of working with Jason Knight and Michael to create our Trust, Will, and Advanced Directives! The process was seamless, quick, and so easy. Also Mr. Knight took the time to explain all of the documents in a super efficient yet understandable manner so we left feeling comfortable, and also with an excellent understanding of what we had signed. Also Michael was so great and patient, helping us with the scheduling! We absolutely loved our experience and will definitely be keeping them in the family!

Steven Lee has been absolutely instrumental in helping me stay organized and protected as a small business owner. There are so many laws and standards to navigate when you're an employer—and Steven has made that process clear, manageable, and far less overwhelming.

He's incredibly responsive, knowledgeable, and easy to work with. Whether I’ve had a quick question or needed support on more complex issues, Steven has shown up with clarity, professionalism, and kindness every time.

If you're a business owner who wants to do right by your team and stay out of legal trouble, I highly recommend working with Steven and his firm. I’m so grateful to have him in my corner.

Needing to get a trust done I was referred to Sasha and they did a great job! The entire team was professional, warm, on top of it, and efficient. The entire process was smooth and easy. Everything was covered in detail so I could understand what was happening. I was very pleased with the service and I highly recommend them!

Today I had the pleasure of consulting with Ms. Valley who was incredibly knowledgeable, helpful, professional, and extremely supportive and compassionate. I am so thankful for her and will definitely refer to her in the future. Highly recommend wish I could leave 10 stars!

Steven Lee stepped in to help me review an employment letter when there was little time allotted.  He made himself available for phone calls to discuss and was very helpful.  I recommend contacting him if you need legal advice.

I reached out to this law firm multiple times via their website—both through email and the chat feature—seeking to inquire about retaining their services. Despite several attempts, over two weeks, I never received any response at all.

I understand that a firm may choose not to take on a particular case, and that's completely within their right. However, it's simply unprofessional and discourteous to ignore potential clients without any acknowledgment or reply. A brief message to say they’re not available or not taking the case would have been the respectful and appropriate thing to do.

First impressions matter, and being completely unresponsive leaves a poor one. I expected better communication from a professional legal office.

It was a pleasure working with Erik Feingold on my personal injury claim. He was very responsive to any questions I had and made the process as painless as possible. With his help I achieved a far better outcome than I expected.

I would highly recommend working with Erik!

We were referred by a friend to Sasha Collins to help us create a family trust.  The firm assigned Jason Knight and Michael White to work with us.  Jason was such a pleasure to work with.  Caring and knowledgable, he led us through the process in great detail, listened to our questions and concerns, and delivered a trust that we fully understand and that we are confident will guide our family in handling our estate when the need arises.

Michael White was fully involved throughout the process, setting up meetings, corresponding, paying great attention to every detail, notarizing, and finally presenting us with the documents beautifully printed and bound.

We will not ever hesitate to recommend Sasha Collins, Jason Knight, and Michael White for estate planning services and have no doubt that the rest of the firm will perform just as well if we are ever to need help with civil law.

My husband and I had a good pleasure of being able to work with Sasha Collins and her legal assistant Michael White. We were referred to this practice by close family friends who had their estate planning done with Sasha, and they could not speak highly of her enough. From the consult to the final signing, Sasha and Michael were exceptional in their work, communication, and thoroughly answering all our questions. We highly recommend seeing Sasha to anyone looking to have their estate planning done.

Erik Feingold was knowledgeable, experienced, and thorough in handling our personal injury lawsuit. He was patient, explained our choices and some intricacies of the legal system in a simple and understandable way; and he and his staff lifted all of the burden of the litigation process off our shoulders. He helped us reach a settlement award much above what the insurance company had offered, and as quick as the system allowed. I would give him 5 stars and recommend him highly for any of your legal needs.
Sincere and helpful. Definitely recommend for anyone seeking advice or representation.

Best experience.  Needed an attorney for an appeal of a case in Ventura County Superior Court.  My wife and I were recommended to use Erik Feingold, Esq. at Myers Widders by another attorney and friend of our family.  We spoke to Erik, who was down to earth in explaining how to proceed in the case, he made suggestions that worked out well, and we won the appeal.  I hope we don't ever need an attorney for this type of work again, but wouldn't hesitate to contact Erik at Myers, Widders.

I was referred to Sasha by a family friend to have my Trust & Will done . Sasha and her Assistant Michael were outstanding to work with . They made me feel comfortable throughout the whole process , answered my questions , and walked me through everything in great detail . I highly recommend the team at Myers Widders Gibson Jones & Feingold
Thank you Sasha and Michael for everything

I had the opportunity to consult with Sheri Valley regarding some legal questions I had. Even though we were not able to move forward, I was very impressed with the level of professionalism and knowledge displayed. Sheri took the time to thoroughly answer all my questions and provided valuable insights into my situation. I truly appreciated the help and guidance received during our consultation. If I ever need legal assistance in the future, I would definitely consider reaching out again. Highly recommend!

I had the pleasure of working with Sasha Collins on a recent probate case and I can't recommend her highly enough to anyone looking for an estate planning attorney or someone saddled with the burden of undergoing the probate process. Navigating the complexities of probate should never be done alone and one needs an expert by one's side.

Sasha was able to assist a mutual client with his late mother's probate case and she did so by guiding him through the process with compassion, professionalism, and patience, which makes a world of a difference when someone is still grieving the loss of a loved one. Sasha also provided timely updates so that the client never had to guess what steps in the probate process were next. Don't hesitate to give Sasha and her team a call for your estate planning needs. They are true super stars.

Hi Sasha,

We just want to thank you and your staff for all the work on our wills and trusts. You made it painless, fast and easy for us to do and that is saying a lot!
We are very happy to have it done. Wish you a happy Holiday season!

Regards,
Jack and Janne

I had the pleasure of working with Steven Lee and Doug Bordner at Myers, Widders, and I couldn't be more grateful for their expertise and dedication. They provided invaluable guidance on both an incentive agreement related to the sale of my company and an employment contract, addressing complex issues with clarity and thoroughness. Steven's help in particular saved me thousands in legal expenses when a dispute arose, as he added in red-line language during the drafting process that gave me leverage during later negotiations. I highly recommend Steven, Doug, and the entire Myers Widders team for anyone seeking business legal services in the Ventura area.
Monique was extremely helpful and provided answers to all of my questions.  Very appreciative of the time she took to speak with me about my legal concerns.

There are comments and opinions from people who might be your friends, all in favor of the lawyer. I have receipts and a contract summary, but it's all negative with Mr. Nelson and his son, who sells houses and is a lawyer. He attended one of my hearings just to make sure I paid all the money I owed his father.
They talk a lot of things at first, and after you pay, it's like having to look for someone else all over again. That's why you should ask questions before hiring someone.
This lawyer does good work and helped my family.
Excellent attorney

reviews.text: Jeremy, Ricky, Arianna and Jamal. This team really went all out to help my son deal with his case. But they also understand mental health disorders, how these clients can get entangled with the criminal justice system, and the various court or county programs that can help minimize their trauma. If you're looking for a legal team that is compassionate but professional, you can't go wrong with Lessem, Newstat & Tooson, LLP. As the former Executive Director of NAMI Ventura County, I recommend this firm enthusiastically.

reviews.ownerResponse: Dear Holly, we extend our sincere sympathy for the loss of your dear father. Unfortunately, we generally do not accept medical malpractice cases. If you requested our services, we generally would have declined representation on that basis and referred you to an attorney specializing in this field.  We have researched our intake calls and we have not found your name, so perhaps your negative experience was actually at another law firm, and you have misidentified us in your review.  If you were in contact with us and had a negative experience, we do sincerely apologize for that. Randy Sutter is a truly to notch attorney.  He helped me with a personal case.  He and his team went above and beyond the call of duty many times, showing empathy, professionalism and legal acumen.  I can't recommend this team enough!

reviews.ownerResponse:
Communications with clients, or prospective clients, is of the utmost importance at our law firm. During our free consultations, we take care to outline potential legal strategies for clients and emphasize client-directed outcomes. In your situation, our firm declined representation or, for confidential reasons, was precluded from representing you. It is also important to note that your review was posted several months after we communicated our inability to represent you.

In sum, your review does not fully reflect the circumstances, particularly given that no attorney-client relationship was ever established. We have previously provided you with a detailed explanation of our position and sought to address your concerns in writing. Unfortunately, despite these efforts, your position remains intransigent.

reviews.text: They explain everything very clearly answer any concerns or questions in a timely matter I definitely recommend them

Thank you so much Randy for settling our case.

reviews.text:
Attorney Sutter assisted us with a B2B legal matter.
He was able to successfully negotiate on our behalf a settlement that far exceeded our expectations. The team at Rounds and Sutter LLP were kind, thorough and professional. They helped me in a very difficult situation, answered every question I had and patiently moved me through the process. Randy was quick to respond to and alleviate our concerns.  He kept us informed of the Court process and was very knowledgeable and professional.  Randy, Claudia and Paola showed sincere compassion for our family situation.  We highly recommend the law office of Rounds and Sutter.

You help make this process so much easier, answered all my questions usually within on business day.
I will recommended to anyone looking for hellp.
Again Thank you.

If you’re thinking about getting an attorney for the obvious reason, please listen to me and consult John Rounds, words cannot describe how professional and honest he is. If I could get 10 stars i would.

I was looking for an experienced bankruptcy attorney, and I’m so happy to have found the John Rounds office. I will recommend him to family and friends. Very helpful, professional, great communication, informative, and just an overall smooth experience. Thank you Randy you are the best!

Greatfully,

Burnis and Karen Reed

Randall answered all my questions professionally and promptly, and I had a lot of questions! Everything went so smoothly. He was so kind and helpful. He made the whole process as painless as possible which I appreciate so much!

The issue was handled in a very professional like manner on all fronts...  mine, the government agency and by Rounds and Sutter.  My hat is off Randy Sutter and to his cool, calm, intelligent professionalism !

Fortunately, I was referred to Randy Sutter to handle some business transactions when my husband was diagnosed with dementia. At a very difficult time, Randy handled everything for me in a compassionate and financially advantageous way. I can’t thank him enough and I highly recommend his services.

I recently filed a Chapter 7 bankruptcy. I had been putting it off for some time because I didn’t want to go through additional stress. Whenever I would leave a message or email them, Attorney Sutter or his assistant Paola would return my call or respond to my email the same day. I am very very happy that we chose this firm to represent us in our bankruptcy case and would definitely recommend to my family and friends.
The whole process of the firm and the Attorney was fantastic. I would recomend this Law office.
Filing for bankruptcy isn’t the easiest to go thru but this team is so help answer all questions comments and concerns. They make you feel comfortable so you can trust them in every step. Thank you!!

Randy always was there to explain to what was going on and to assure me it was going as planned.  If you are looking for someone who will be on your side and take very good care of you, reach out to Randall Sutter.
It was great working with this law firm they made this hard process much easier, very thrust worthy. I recommend them 100%

John is a fantastic lawyer.

I would not have being happier!

Monica

100 rounds of applause to you guys!!

Mr. Rounds and his staff  conducted themselves with the utmost respect and attention to me throughout the stages of my Bankruptcy..The process is scary in of itself but Mr. Rounds handled everything so professional and in a timely manner...

Rounds & Sutter LLP is very professional. They answered all my questions and they put 110% effort into communicating with their clients and help them win the case. I am really happy Rounds & Sutter LLP represented me in court.
John is a good guy and a honest person. Everyone their is very nice and helpful. John, tells you what you need to know and explains everything very well.

When I first met Randy I was completely lost and scared regarding the case I had. I had been to a few lawyers prior to coming to Rounds & Sutter and no one was willing to give it a go but when I met with Randy he was willing to give it a try. I am beyond thankful he did because he was the perfect lawyer for my case. He explained everything during the entire process, made me feel comfortable and never pushed anything. I am forever grateful for Randy and his staff. They are the BEST!

My current husband found Randy for me as I was not in the state of mind to deal with a debt my late husband had accrued under one of my credit cards before he decided to take his own life 6 years ago.  By this time the debt had been sent to an attorney's office for collection and was over 10 years old. Apparently, the company had put a lien on my house and everything! Not knowing what to expect or what was going to happen with a debt that started out over $20,000.00 I went in to see Randy for a free consult.  Randy was incredibly sensitive to my situation and immediately made me feel as ease with his expertise in debt resolution.  Within that first consult I knew Randy was the man for us.  Sure enough within a short period of time Randy was able to negotiate the debt down to under $2000.00 and was able to get the lien off my house.  I can not even tell you the relief and appreciate I feel for Randy and his staff for taking care of this for me and my family.  What he did for us was priceless.  I highly recommend Randy of Rounds & Sutter LLP
These guys really care.

I remember a time when I was on top of the world. Everything I touch turned to gold, any idea I had I knew would be successful. Those were the days I thought I was untouchable, and quite honestly I was. I had found success, financial security and was living the life I always wanted. I was providing for my kids making my family proud did not have a care in the world. Then in an instant everything changed, I went from being on top of the world to falling hard, hitting the ground with a very large splat! I like many, had been caught up in the real estate bubble and when things burst all over the nation, they burst big in my home as well. I thought I was done for; I had no hope, and no understanding of how I could make things better. With some stroke of luck I reached out and called my attorney (Tamara Harper, who also had become a friend of mine), and I explained that I was upside down in life and needed some help. She referred me to two individuals who are now not only my attorneys but also dear friend, John Rounds, and Randy Sutter of Rounds in Sutter ... John and Randy made an appointment with me the day that I called them.  Without getting to specific about my troubles….I am here to tell you that John and Randy gave me reason to breathe again.  With their strong support and extensive legal knowledge, they provided me a path to a new life.  John and Randy were then and will always be my ROCK.  They always have my best interest at heart and keep my legal matters in perfect order. I recommend to anyone who needs help with their life to see Rounds and Sutter.  They are the BEST!!!

I was very lucky to have found the Law Offices of Rounds & Sutter. John, Randy, and their staff were always kind, efficient and expedient. I had retained two other attorneys for financial assistance and after I paid them they both said they could not help me. John looked at my situation and only after he was sure he could help me did I retain him. I would definitely use them again and highly recommend them to anyone that needs their services.

Throughout the entire process, Monty was extremely responsive, communicative, and professional. Even after the case concluded, he continued to be available and supportive. Thanks to his dedication and advocacy, I was able to obtain 100% custody and ensure my children’s safety. I am incredibly grateful for his work and highly recommend him.

Monty represented me in a civil harassment restraining order case, and we won. He is exceptionally prepared, strategic, and highly knowledgeable about courtroom process. He explained everything clearly, set realistic expectations, and guided me through a stressful situation with confidence and care. I always felt supported, well-informed, and confident with him in my corner. I would recommend Monty without hesitation to anyone needing skilled, effective legal representation.

I would like to share how  grateful 🙏 that I am for the representation of Mr. Monty S. Gill. Mr. Gill represented me in a legal matter and was able to get my case dismissed.  He is so patient, professional, experienced and understanding that I would highly recommend him to anyone who is looking for an A-1 polished attorney. I am completely satisfied with the representation and treatment that I received.

He helped me sort out an issue, that then turned into mistakes made by the court somehow issuing a warrant and creating more of a headache than necessary. Give him a call!

I hired Monty after my denial and he was great. Walked me through what the next steps would be, took me through each step / process.Kept me informed on what was happening and made sure I was prepared for the court hearings. I would highly recommend him!

After years of trying on our own and going through multiple appeals, we contacted Monty. He thoroughly reviewed our son’s case, assembled supporting documentation and successfully guided us through a judicial hearing to award benefits. We are very appreciative of his efforts and the results.

My husband was having so much stress after being denied SSI disability, not being able to work and having no income. We called Monty and he was very nice and knowledgeable about the appeal process.  Monty was very honest about what the outcomes could be without giving us false hopes.  He was always available to answer any questions and explain anything we asked about.  It was a good experience working with him.  The outcome was a fully favorable decision!  Thank you so much Monty!

I hired Mr. Monty Gill to appeal the denial of my case. Mr. Gill was very professional and compassionate from the moment I made my initial phone call. I was provided with a lot of paperwork to complete to build my case stronger prior to our court hearing. Mr. Gill worked hard and was very well organized. Claudia in the front office was also very kind and sweet. Mr. Gill answered all my questions and returned all my phone calls promptly! Let me tell you...this attorney was on the ball...and YES, Mr. Monty Gill WON my case! Thank you so much Mr. Gill!
Monty Gill has been very Professional for the last year, easy too correspond with and his answers are easy to understand. Thank you!

Not only did Monty WIN my case, he made me feel comfortable right out of the gate.  He answered all of my questions, took took his time and made sure I understood everything.  He would allow me to text him questions and always responded to me quickly.  He worked so hard for me, and I didn't think I would win because of my age, but he put together a solid case!  He was a blessing to me and an absolute amazing person!  Thank you Monty!
This guy is not only a exception attorney he is an amazing human being and has been a tremendous encouragement through all we’re going through!!
Monty is a persistent and dedicated attorney and advocate. He did a phenomenal job assisting me with my sons disability case. I can not recommend him more!

I had a consultation with Deborah Gutierrez and it was a great experience. She took the time to listen carefully to my situation, explained my options clearly, and answered all my questions with patience and professionalism. I left the consultation feeling confident and informed. Even though it was just a consultation, I could tell she genuinely cares about her clients and provides honest guidance. I highly recommend!

I was named executor for a family member living in California; when she passed I hired David Quintana to be my probate lawyer on a recommendation from my realtor. I live in North Carolina so we had to sell property, settle legal claims, collect money from a European bank, locate a church that no longer existed and find people for whom we had no information-all long distance. I honestly don’t think either one of us knew how involved and difficult this case would be and I kept praying David wouldn’t run for the hills.  He didn’t run and we worked together, each one picking up the ball for each other; he never missed a beat!
David is impressively well versed in probate and real estate law; apparently foreign and domestic. Unless a professional is exceptional, I don’t give reviews but David is really worth my respect and gratitude
reviews.ownerResponse:
Dear Patricia,
What an incredible journey we navigated together across state lines and international boundaries! Handling probate matters from North Carolina while dealing with European banks, missing churches, and countless unknowns required true collaboration between us. I must admit, the complexity of locating people without information and managing property sales remotely challenged even my experience in probate and real estate law. However, cases like these remind me why I love the intricacies of legal work - each puzzle piece eventually falls into place when persistence meets expertise. Being called exceptional by someone with such high standards means the world to me, and I'm honored you took time to share this detailed account of our partnership.
Most respectfully,
David
Expert Legal Advisor

reviews.text:
While on my daily morning walk, I was struck by a vehicle which stopped on top of my lower body.I ended up in the hospital with injuries to my leg,shoulder, knees,back and a concussion.
I was in the emergency room with my wife, in pain, scared of what I was going to do next. My job, bills and my quality of life. My daughter-law recommended the law offices of Rose, Klein and Maria’s LLP. I was contacted by Bill Grewe.
I had never had a need for a lawyer and didn’t know what to expect.
From the beginning Bill was amazing. He put my wife and I at ease. I explained what happened. He explained the process to us and genuinely cared about us and again, made us at ease. He kept us informed every step of the way.
Not only is Bill Grewe a good lawyer, he is a good person. We will definitely recommend you to our family and friends if the need ever arises.
Thank You Bill for all your hard work
Eddie & Terri
reviews.ownerResponse: Eddie & Terri, thank you so much for sharing your story. We’re really glad to hear you’re on the mend after such a scary experience. It means a lot to know Bill was able to make things easier for you and guide you with care. That’s the kind of support we hope every client feels. Thanks again for your kind words and for recommending us. Wishing you both a smooth recovery!

They gave me the name of an attorney who would like to be able to help me, and they followed up with an email confirming the same information. Jason Franz is second to none!!!! Guy came into court sick as a dog and still kicked ass and then took names. I wasn’t doing anything fighting in court for a year and he came in on his first appearance and got it settled and done! Trust me! This dude is worth every penny!

I am extremely grateful for my lawyer his name is Jacob n I call him Mr Jacob’s… he was extremely kind n there for me in all my needs… showed up to court for me n he is the best in ventura county!!!! My case got dismissed I was extremely nervous due to never being in trouble but he did the best job!!! If you or anyone needs a lawyer go to him i promise u wont be disappointed! Jason was easy to talk to, and was well versed on the DVRO I needed help with. Speaking with him reassured my process and I know I would be able to utilize his skills in the upcoming court dates. Thanks so much!!

Bamieh & De Smeth would be the only Ventura County law firm I wound recommend! Jennifer Yates came in after I had fired a previous firm and swooped in like a super hero saving the day. Working with Anzac Jacobs was an excellent experience. From the start, he provided clear guidance and maintained open communication throughout the entire process. I knew this was going to be the right firm when Angel Champagne answered the phone. She sincerely listened to the story of my case. I felt welcomed with Angel’s calming voice and demeanour. She’s truly an angel and an asset to the Bamieh & De Smeth law firm.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you so much for your thoughtful five-star review! We appreciate you taking the time to share your experience with us. reviews.text: For legal challenges, I recommend Anzac at Bamieh & De Smeth in Ventura. He truly takes care of his clients.

I’ve spoken to over nine law firms in my search for representation, and Charlotte Krem was the first person to truly treat me like a human being. She displays high intelligence in her area of expertise, deeply intuitive, and approaches her work with a rare combination of diplomacy and sharp legal acumen. As a busy CEO currently working with 12 lawyers across different matters, I know talent when I see it — and Charlotte stands out.

I was seeking representation for a U.S. case with a small but complex detail that led eight firms to turn me away. Charlotte took the time to go through my case inside and out, front to back, before presenting it to her senior leadership team. Her dedication, thoroughness, and skill left me both exceptionally grateful and extremely impressed.

If you are looking for a personal injury lawyer who combines compassion with unmatched professionalism, I would highly recommend this firm — and especially Charlotte. This firm has been a pleasure to deal with.

I highly recommend Bamieh and DeSmeth PLC for legal guidance.

I was faced with potential arrest.  I called Bamieh and DeSmeth and they provided me legal advice to minimize self incrimination during law enforcement interviews and legal advice to avoid serious charges by the DA.

I had the privilege of working with Jason Frantz during an incredibly difficult and emotional time in my life. His legal expertise combined with his compassionate approach made a world of difference, and I am truly grateful for his help in reaching a resolution. I would highly recommend him to anyone facing a challenging family law matter.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you so much for your thoughtful five-star review! We truly appreciate you taking the time to share your experience. It was a pleasure working with you, and we’re honored that you trusted us to handle your legal matter.

reviews.text: Danielle De Smith handled our case against a school district in Ventura County with exceptional skill and professionalism. I initially approached the situation as a fiercely protective mother, ready to fight, but Danielle’s grace, expertise, and strategic approach proved far more effective than my emotional charge. She navigated every challenge with confidence and efficiency, ensuring we achieved the best possible outcome. I couldn’t be more grateful for her guidance and support, and I am truly proud to call her both my attorney and my friend.

I cannot recommend Ron Bamieh and Anzac Jacobs highly enough. I was wrongly accused of a misdemeanor charge. From the very beginning, Ron approached my case with incredible patience, empathy, and professionalism. He took the time to listen, understand my concerns, and explain every step of the legal process in a way that was clear and reassuring.

What truly set him apart is his knowledge of the DA’s office and his dedication and strategic approach, which ultimately led to my misdemeanor case being dismissed before trial. Throughout the process, he remained calm, supportive, and focused always available to answer my questions, no matter how big or small.

If you’re looking for a lawyer who not only fights for you but also genuinely cares about your well-being, Ron Bamieh is the one to call. I am beyond grateful for his help and would not hesitate to recommend him to anyone in need of legal representation.
I highly recommend, I got great help and I’m very grateful I felt very cared for

I would highly recommend the Law Office of Bamieh and de Smith! Really bad experience, always laying, never returning phone calls, too many promises

I was named executor for a family member living in California; when she passed I hired David Quintana to be my probate lawyer on a recommendation from my realtor. I live in North Carolina so we had to sell property, settle legal claims, collect money from a European bank, locate a church that no longer existed and find people for whom we had no information-all long distance. I honestly don’t think either one of us knew how involved and difficult this case would be and I kept praying David wouldn’t run for the hills.  He didn’t run and we worked together, each one picking up the ball for each other; he never missed a beat!
David is impressively well versed in probate and real estate law; apparently foreign and domestic. Unless a professional is exceptional, I don’t give reviews but David is really worth my respect and gratitude
reviews.ownerResponse:
Dear Patricia,
What an incredible journey we navigated together across state lines and international boundaries! Handling probate matters from North Carolina while dealing with European banks, missing churches, and countless unknowns required true collaboration between us. I must admit, the complexity of locating people without information and managing property sales remotely challenged even my experience in probate and real estate law. However, cases like these remind me why I love the intricacies of legal work - each puzzle piece eventually falls into place when persistence meets expertise. Being called exceptional by someone with such high standards means the world to me, and I'm honored you took time to share this detailed account of our partnership.
Most respectfully,
David
Expert Legal Advisor

reviews.text: I went through two lawyers before meeting Mr. Michie. The other two lawyers I dealt with gave me a false positive in which convinced me to follow their advice and spend more money on them. After doing more due diligence on my case and reviewing case laws there was so much uncertainty that I could not trust their word anymore. I met Mr. Michie and discussed everything with him, including the information I was given by my previous attorneys. Mr. Michie was straightforward with me in regards to my case and the California laws. He provided me with so much research as well as coaching me to look for other resources in order to show me that the California laws in my case are not the results I wanted to hear, especially after being convinced and spending an enormous amount of money from counsel who kept me hopeful. Thankfully, with Mr. Michie's experience, he came up with a plan and made a case that provided closure and positive results. You always hope for integrity and honesty when it comes to hiring attorneys, but unfortunately it doesn't work out that way most of the time. But I was blessed and very thankful to have finally found the most honest attorney. Thank Mr. Michie for representing me and being an attorney with heart.
Michie was referred by one of my co-workers. I am very satisfied with his services.  Michie was able to help me tremendously.

Attorney Doug Michie has assisted me successfully in a variety of legal matters, mostly related to real estate. He is very knowledgeable, honest and compassionate. He even made himself available at odd hours to help resolve time sensitive issues. Additionally, he has always provided options to minimize the fees incurred. I would highly recommend him.

I have a dispute with my neighbor, I had some questions but didn't want to break the bank answering them.  I found Mr. Michie to be workable and flexible.  I got my answers for what I consider to be a reasonable price.  Couple of years later, I saw Mr. Michie walking up to my neighbors house. reviews.text: I have had the privilege of working closely with Kendall VanConas of A to Z Law over the years. In every interaction, Kendall has consistently demonstrated the highest level of professionalism and productivity. Both she and her team have been incredibly accommodating, not only to me but also to my clients. I would highly recommend Kendall to anyone seeking expert legal advice without hesitation.
Very responsive, good listeners, excellent advice.
Kendall is always great to work with.  I truly appreciate the personalized service and client care.

We hired Kendall VanConas and this firm to update our estate - they initially said they'd print our documents and give return them to us in a day or two - instead they took weeks just to print copies of our estate documents and only gave them back weeks later after we had to prompt them and ask for them.

After that, we had to continually call and send emails to repeatedly ask when we were going to ever hear from them about our estate planning after our initial meeting in May, we were told their assistant went on vacation so they were behind and would try to catch up soon (but still never heard anything from them after that), weeks went by and again we reached out to ask when things would move forward and were told Kendall had surgery and had "gotten behind" on things in her recovery (We were never told she was out for a medical leave prior to that). We had to contact them again on July 1st only to be told they were all out of the office until after July 8th - this firm doesn't do work, they do billing and make excuses, that's about it.

They also refused to give us notes from the one meeting we had with them - for which we were billed $750 and told, the notes from that meeting were "privy for them" not for us so our request for a recap of our own estate planning meeting was refused.

Do not waste your time with this firm, they have NO incentive to move forward with your project or estate planning, they will take you as a client then sit on your estate planning and DO NOTHING, but bill you for any meetings, then drop the ball, and you will never hear from them again, very unprofessional and our experience with them was completely frustrating and a total waste of our time, as well as costly - as we got nothing from our $750 meeting with them, not even an outline or meeting recap of the notes they took from our estate planning meeting.

They also don't communicate at all, and never told us about the lead attorney's surgery or time out from the office for her recovery - and apparently, no one else in the firm does anything. (They take a full week off for July 4th - the entire firm apparently, as no one responded to our July 1 email as they were all "out of the office until after July 8th). After July 8th we still heard NOTHING. Kendall told us she would follow up with a timeline of our estate planning status the following week, but she never did, and that never happened.

When they had an assistant out of the office that also apparently makes all their work come to a screeching halt - all of this is inexcusable, unprofessional and is a poor representation of a firm that is supposed to be on their game helping people update their estate planning.

You will likely pass away before they ever get to updating your estate - we moved on and found a much better firm that actually does work, and would strongly recommend people stay away from this firm if they need something done in a reasonable time and feel communication is important at all, as this firm doesn't communicate, they make excuses when you reach out because if you hire them, you will be the one doing all the planning and reaching out, they do not do anything at all but sit on your estate planning and watch time go by!

From the first meeting in May until we fired them in July for a span of almost 2 months, we had one meeting, they copied our files and then absolutely nothing else ever happened in moving forward with our estate planning - they never gave us a timeline for getting it done, which we asked about for 3 weeks, but they never provided a timeline because they had no plan to do the work or had decided for some reason due to their incompetence and lack of continuity in their own office and within their staff's capability to take years to do an update on our estate planning.

This firm is not doing anything but taking business then sitting on it, doing meetings with clients and refusing to give the clients any notes or minutes from meetings clients are being billed for! There are firms that do effective estate planning, but sadly, this isn't one of them.

I had the worst experience dealing with an totally incompetent attorney and this firm. It seemed to me that all they cared about was billing you for services that now I know they did not provide or perform to the best of their abilities as a responsible and diligent counsel should do. Their lack of care and indifference is causing our family much pain and potentially loss of our life’s savings. This is not right and I don’t believe they should be in business if their motivation is solely to line their pockets.

reviews.text:
I hired Mr. Seigenfeld (Rick) as I had a time sensitive matter involving a post divorce judgment QDRO, that had yet to be resolved over the previous 5 years, since the divorce judgement.

What should have been a simple matter to resolve, quickly became a very complicated and frustrating situation.

Coming into this situation after a 30 year law enforcement career, as well as  this situation's previous divorce proceedings, I can confidently state that I am writing this review objectively after having years of professional and personal experience with many attorneys in the criminal, family law and civil arenas.

From my initial consultation through the end of the process, Rick and his staff were extremely helpful, and VERY patient during what was a very frustrating situation for me.

From a personal perspective, when ever I had a question or didn't understand something, Rick, himself was always very accessible to answer my questions or ease my frustrations in a personable way.  As were all of his staff.

From a professional perspective, I couldn't have asked for more. Rick is extremely knowledgeable when it comes to his areas of practice. More importantly, If there is a unique situation he has not previously experienced, or is not expertly versed in, rest assured he will advise you of such and seek out more information from an expert in said area before moving on. This aspect gave me great confidence in Rick, as this is what a knowledgeable, professional does!  What he won't do is BS you and pretend to know something he doesn't, in order to hastily triage your matter and keep it moving down the conveyer belt of cases as so many do.

Also under the heading of "Professionalism", Rick is very level headed and strategically focused on the "long game" of his client's individual situations.  Unlike many, he is not going take your money then immediately portray himself as your personal attack dog for hire, telling you what you want to hear, while parroting your personal distain for the opposition without objectively looking out for your best interests.  Trust me, you don't need a subjective "best friend" in a situation like this, you need a knowledgeable, objective strategist that has your best long term interests in mind.  This was exactly who Rick was in handling my matter.

Lastly, from a business perspective, Seige Law could not have been anymore professional.  All fees were reasonable and clearly explained up front, all documents were professionally drafted and expeditiously filed, and billing statements were sent out each and every month, clearly stating all charges and balances.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you for your business and the positive review. It was a pleasure assisting you.

reviews.text: One of the best. His skill in understanding and building a case is truly exceptional; he leaves no detail overlooked and consistently crafts a strategy that puts me in the best possible position. In the courtroom, he’s calm, persuasive, understands what the judge is asking, and is highly respected, advocating for my case with clarity and strength, relying on good old-fashioned facts and evidence. But what truly sets him apart is his empathy—he listens, understands my concerns, and is there to guide me through every step. I couldn’t imagine a better lawyer, and I’m beyond grateful to have had him by my side once again.

Due to this attorney’s poor organization, lousy management, and general inability to remember both client information and conversations with his clients, I’ve lost not only thousands of dollars, I’ve lost time with my aging parent, time that I’ll never get back.
I hired Iman in hopes of helping me with a dispute over seeing a family member, and what should of been a simple court appearance, his lack of ability to manage the case he kept dragging the case along, pushing back the court dates, due his “other case” which seemed to always be a problem for him to manage (this is an online court appearance, shouldn’t of taken more than an hour of his time).
Each time we talked I had to restate the facts to him over and over, as if he wasn’t able to remember basic details or concentrate on information I sent to him via phone/text/email.
Of course, the urgency of being able to see my family member as they have declining health has made me desperate to move the case along, only to have Iman over and over push the court date due his “other case”. He claimed to talk to the other attorney in the dispute, but offered no viable outcome outside of court proceedings.
In the end after wasting thousands of dollars and him demanding more, it became clear he’s just trying to make as much money as possible, taking advantage of my eagerness to resolve the case as well as my limited time due to being in the middle of a complex move.
Don’t bother wasting your time with this attorney if you need results and don’t like your pocketbook ransacked with his extreme levels of ignorance and incompetence to manage his schedules

Iman Jaffrey represented me in a serious court case. He worked diligently for almost four years to earn me my life and career back in the face of serious allegations. Iman above all else is a kind and caring man. He spent hours on the phone with me while I was scared and stressed and would lay out what was happening clearly and concisely. For almost half a decade Iman stood by me, always answering my calls and texts. Never saying he was too busy. I could not recommend this man more if you are in a legal situation. If you are honest and messed up or simply made a mistake and want to be a better person, Iman will fight for you like no other lawyer I have ever seen. (truth be told, hes the only lawyer ive ever had to hire BUT for almost 4 years I was in court and watched other lawyers who seemed to care more about the prosecutors opinion than their defendants needs) Iman will fight for you. Hes a family man and a kind soul. If your reading this Iman, Im doing great and I think about all you did for me often.

-Dalton

reviews.text: Randall Kaiden is incredibly conscientious, unusually ethical, and does extremely thorough research before he engages in estate and elder law planning. He is also an innovative thinker and one of the only estate elder law attorneys in our community who truly understands public benefits. In my parents situation, his knowledge, patience and expertise was not only useful but critical because they are not US Citizens, but do receive Medicare, Medi-Cal and Supplemental Security Income through the Qualified Medicare Beneficiary program. Loss of those benefits would have been devastating for our family, but was exactly what we were facing. That's because my brother passed away without a will or trust, leaving us in no-where-land. Mr. Kaiden was the only lawyer who understood how critical the loss of these benefits would have been for my parents, if not handled properly. Truly, the issues brought up by the untimely passing of my brother were plentiful and complicated. Thankfully though, Mr. Kaiden was there to save us. He's really a special type of professional and I speak for my whole family when I say that we highly recommended him.

Jon Light helped our case recently.  I just don’t know how I can express appreciation and how graceful we were for his help. He is a lawyer with heart.  He was always considerate not to waste his time / our money.  He was quick and I felt no time was wasted.  He informed us and asked what we wanted and gave us advice if we could not decide what to do.

The first lawyer we consulted with, referred by an acquittance, told us it would cost us $100k for his legal fee alone.  This would not include the settlement or the cost of the opposing parties attorney which we were likely to have to pay. He made us very nervous and we didn't feel right about him.  Nothing was done and we didn't hear from him for about 2-3 weeks. (There are 2 email correspondences between him and Ms. MF (Plaintiff's attorney) who said her charge was $925 per hour also didn't feel right.

We were charged $3,625- for consulting with the first lawyer which included the three 30 minute phone conversations between him and my husband after we decided to leave him and move to Jon. One of the conversations was with he and his partner telling my husband how good they were with this kind of litigation and we should not leave them, etc.  We build for two attorney at $625 per hour rate. I successfully got the charge of $937.50 back for these 3 phone conversations.

My point is that we made the right decision leaving the first lawyer and came to Jon Light.  We were very fortunate that someone referred him to us, that the person also went through the PAGA litigation with Jon’s assistance in the past.  The sense of security with Jon helped us to reduce our stress level to go through this lawsuit for 9 months.  We knew we could trust him from our gut and we are very glad we did.  I just can't say enough good things about Jon Light.
Bad exprerience.

Beware of this company. They will charge by the minute for everything including emails, texts, calls, etc. It will add up quickly! You’d be better served going with a fixed price attorney or law firm.

It's really important to have a solid employment attorney to have you by your side -- and I highly recommend Jonathan and his legal firm Light Gabler.
