reviews.text: Great attorney. Recommend.

Hello, my name is Tim.

I normally don’t write reviews, but after my recent
experience with Mr. Welch, I felt it was necessary.

Mr. Welch was actually my second attorney. I originally hired an attorney out of Calabasas, although he was communicative and respectful, he was not experienced in gun law. His honest opinion was he could not guarantee that I would not end up being a felon & was suggesting that I might plead guilty to get a lesser charge, which is really scary to somebody who’s has never been arrested or convicted in his life.

I started researching attorneys that were familiar in gun law. There was one attorney that was recommended by multiple people and multiple attorneys in the Ventura county, which was Mr. Welch.

Upon meeting Mr. Welch and explaining the situation I was in, he was very understanding and also very upset that an honest, hard-working citizen would end up being in my position. He assured me that he would do everything in his power to make sure I did not step foot in a jail.

Mr. Welch is highly knowledgeable and skilled when it comes to gun law and to be quite honest, I don’t think I would’ve had the same outcome had l stayed with the first attorney. During our preliminary examination Mr. Welch did an amazing job, his attention to detail, his vast knowledge on the mechanicals of weapons and his extensive research landed a modern day miracle, & my case was dismissed.

Through the whole process, he was very supportive and very communicative. He always got back to me in a timely fashion either with a phone call or email. To give you my honest opinion, I would highly recommend Mr. Welch. My family and I thank you for everything that you did for us. I can’t express the amount of gratitude that I have for you and your firm.

Through the whole process Mr. Welch believed that I was innocent & asserted me that everything was going to be okay. There was one thing that stood out to me, after the case was dismissed, Mr. Welch demonstrated an act of humility in my opinion, instead of being overconfident and cocky his reply was (God is good.) me being a man of faith i definitely agree with that statement!

From the bottom of my heart, thank you for everything, Mr. Welch!!!!!

reviews.text: If I could leave a 100 star review I would. I had a felony on my record from 10 years prior and was recently charged with possession of a firearm after an illegal search. I had already payed for another lawyer and was told that if I was lucky I would be doing only a couple of years, at this point I had already lost all hope. After a few months of no progress, I made the decision to change lawyers, after meeting with Chris something told me that this is the lawyer I needed. I decided to put my trust in him instead, and he took over from that day forward. Having him fight for my case was the best decision I’ve ever made, he was passionate, confident, and strong in court. He instantly got me off of probation. I would have been grateful with being offered a plea deal of little to no jail time, instead he was able to get all charges dropped for me. I am immensely grateful to Chris and Lisa for all they did, the dedication they had to fighting my case was as if they were fighting for their own loved one. My family and myself are forever indebted to them. We can finally move on from this nightmare and I can lay peacefully in bed knowing I am a free man thanks to Chris. I will be praying for their continued success and will never forget all they did for me and my family. Thank you always.

Her determination, unwavering focus, and approach reminded me of the character portrayed by Julia Roberts in Erin Brockovich, where an individual stands firm against enormous odds in pursuit of justice. Mrs. Emerson demonstrated this same level of perseverance and commitment, consistently fighting on behalf of her client with integrity and principles at the forefront.

In an industry where many may be driven by financial considerations, Mrs. Emerson practices law with a deep sense of morality and devotion. Her passion for achieving justice for her clients is evident in every aspect of her work, and it has been refreshing to see such a strong moral compass guiding her practice.

I rarely provide recommendations, but I can confidently say that Mrs. Emerson is one of the finest attorneys I have had the privilege of observing. If you or someone you know requires a capable, diligent, and principled personal injury attorney, I strongly recommend making Taylor Emerson your first and only call. I was very impressed with Iva when I first worked with her a few years ago when she assisted me with my divorce.  She was knowledgeable and very insightful regarding the laws and how they applied to both of us in our situation.  What made Iva REALLY stand out, though, was how she remained completely focused on the law.  She was always reasonable and fair to both sides and never tried to create an unnecessary  "war" between us.  For these reasons, I chose her again when I needed legal assistance for a recent custody issue involving my husband's young daughter.  Her mother was refusing to negotiate and disagreed
to our original, very minimal, custody change request asking for alternating Saturday overnight visits to be added. This forced us to file a modified custody request to obtain the visitation that we believed was 100% legally justified. Per Iva's legal advice, we also included ALL of the visitation we wanted to be added.  Iva remained focused on the law and always advised how the law applies on each side.  She offered solid legal advice for us to chose from.  She had no interest in trying to escalate the disagreement in order to keep us arguing.  This is a huge plus because it was very emotional.  After mediation, the mediator's custody recommendation included just about everything that we requested in our filed custody modification. Opposing counsel completely disagreed and was still unwilling to negotiate.  It was set to go before the judge after lunch.  During lunch, we were called back because the opposing side was now ready to come to an agreement.  This new custody agreement included far more visitation than what we were originally seeking in the
very beginning before having to get the court involved!  Iva's assistance during the process was key !

This was an empowering experience. I came to Iva having zero confidence and truly no idea of what I needed to do. It is because of Iva’s guidance and patience that she helped me navigate some pretty steep waters. I am so incredibly grateful to her for helping me keep my head above water. She was the consummate professional I needed with excellent leadership skills.

Iva Oza is the consummate professional.  We came to her for a review of my mother's trust.  As complications arose, she met every challenge, and explained everything clearly in terms we could easily understand.  Just as importantly, she made taking the necessary steps as hassle-free as possible for us.  I cannot recommend her highly enough.

reviews.text: Horrible lawyer, ripped my family off. Wouldn't accept an offer of 6 digits and demanded that it be open ended even though he knew it wouldn't go past jury selection. Basically rushed my case to the end thinking he was gonna get a bunch of money and then left me high & dry. Claimed he would talk to my new public defender and never did. Also refused to give records of the money transactions to my family. Stay away from this guy. I'd give him zero stars if I could.
reviews.ownerResponse:
This is NOT my client!! I frequently get confused with another attorney named Paul TAYLOR who does get those kinds of comments and who has been disciplined (suspended) by the state bar. I am assuming that this was meant for him and not me. But if I ever in my career get an offer of six digits I'm fairly certain I will take it!

There is nothing in the facts described in this review that in any way shape or form resemble any of my clients cases or any way that I would personally handle a case.

I ALWAYS accept cases on a FLAT FEE BASIS. Nothing is ever open ended. I have been practicing for 20 years and have never had an open ended fee agreement on a criminal case.

Criminal cases are generally divided into two parts. Everything before preliminary hearing, and then everything after, which is generally the trial. Like all other criminal defense attorneys the first stage is to hire an attorney up through and including the prelimary hearing. 95% of cases get resolved in that timeframe. It is only when the case cannot be dismissed or otherwise settled that the trial is necessary.

Whenever you hire me you always know where your case is in the process and what you've hired me to do.

It's always sad when someone feels as though their attorney has done them wrong. And I'm sorry to the person that left this review because they obviously feel whoever their attorney was did them wrong. And that is the difference between me and other attorneys. I won't do you wrong in that way. Having said that, if you still have a case that is open please call me and I would be happy to discuss your case with you. Maybe there is something I can do to help You.

Good luck.

reviews.text:
I hired Eric Ridley as my attorney because his website made the bankruptcy process seem simple and straightforward. Unfortunately, my personal experience was very different. A large portion of my debt came from my son’s high school football injury and his seizure disorder, so I was already overwhelmed and going through one of the most stressful periods of my life. Instead of receiving the guidance I desperately needed, most of my case was handled by an out-of-state paralegal, and the process dragged on for over a year.

The one time I spoke with Eric directly, he made a comment suggesting I “cut off” my 16-year-old son because his medical bills were too high. As a single mom with no second parent involved, I was devastated. I had no idea how I was supposed to simply stop supporting my child. That conversation left me in tears, and I eventually reported my concerns to the California Bar. Eric agreed to reimburse part of the fee I had paid.

In my opinion, bankruptcy representation requires compassion, clear communication, and hands-on guidance—especially for clients dealing with medical-related debt—and I did not feel I received that. Switching attorneys was the best decision I made. I hired Karen Grant, who immediately fixed the issues, communicated professionally, and had my case filed within a month of our first meeting.

This review reflects my personal experience, and I hope it helps others who may be searching for the right attorney during an already difficult time.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you so much, Sarah, for taking the time to share your experience. I truly appreciate your trust in my services, and I'm grateful for your feedback. Your story highlights the importance of compassion and clear communication, and I'm thankful for your contribution to help others make informed choices about their important matters. Clearly, you were dissatisfied, and that is never my goal. This is clearly not the norm for my level of service, and something I never want people to leave with.

Eric was very helpful navigating the probate system after the passing of my father. He passed in 2020, at the beginning of the Covid pandemic with no Trust. Between the courts shutting down, then going virtual, the executor of the Will and the beneficiaries being in multiple different states, it was no easy task. Eric was always professional and calm, available to us when we had questions and assuring us that the slow court process was normal, pandemic or not. He has always been quick to respond even when I tend to email after hours or weekends.
Eric is a real, down to earth person. No BS, which rates high in my book.

reviews.text: Donna Santo Mehas is a very professional lawyer, along with a very professional staff.  I was searching for a lawyer familiar with Military law, and Donna was the top of the search!!  I needed a divorce attorney and she has amazing military knowledge.  She kept me up-to-date on everything and if I did not understand something she was very patient and explained the situation in detail, until I completely understood the situation.  When it came down to spousal support, a lump sum was not satisfactory and Donna "fought" for me until I was awarded a lump sum and full monthly spousal support (we did not have children) and now I am able to live comfortably without worrying if I am going to make ends meet.  If you need a professional lawyer, whether or not you need Military law, consider Donna Santo Mehas, you will definitely NOT be disappointed!!
Santos Mehas law firm is knowledgeable, courteous and responsive.  I would highly recommend them to others.

When I brought in this law firm to represent me in my divorce, my wife and her lawyer knew I had gained the ability to fight back if necessary. From that point on, negotiations could proceed. Peace through strength. Fortunately, no protracted or unnecessary fighting was necessary. Due to longstanding relationships, understandings, and trust between my team and my wife's team, deals were worked out on several fronts, avoiding crossing anyone's red lines and resulting in a final settlement in a reasonable amount of time at a price far below what either of us expected to pay.

I need assistance ASAP! I called many firms & I was turned away due to COVID & the emergency of my case. I contacted Dona & Michael & they were there so fast, helped me prep, told me what to expect, what they needed from me & explained the processes. reviews.text: I was involved in a life-changing auto accident, and, with no previous experience in personal injury, I had no idea how to find a good personal injury lawyer. Not once, during the entire process did I wonder if I had the Best representation.  I defiantly did!  Best of all, they negotiated a settlement (which I deserved) that I could have ever imagined, even though the other side appeared very non-cooperative in the beginning,.  Todd would not give up or stop fighting for me.  I would not ever hesitate to refer friends and family to this Law Firm.  It was a great experience during a very stressful time.  Thank you Team!  Forever grateful!

reviews.text: Working with Delgado Avalos  law firm was the best decision I made. I felt so confident and secure with the work they did to be able to achieve my goal. My husband was the one who came across Delgado Law firm and from the initial start I know she cared about my safety and the safety of my kids. People say you need to take a leap of faith to achieve your dreams and I did with the help of Delgado. After years of struggling to find a reliable attorney once we started our process with Delgado law firm they made it easy to get everything needed for my advance parole and then afterward the documents needed for residency. Even though some things were harder to get they helped me keep calm and steady to not lose focus of the bigger picture. I was able to get my residency and god willing soon enough my citizenship. I give my gratitude to everyone working at Delgado Avalos law firm. More importantly I am grateful to have friends and family that helped me cover the cost of the attorney and the documents needed for this. It was a long journey for sure but in the end it paid off and I feel more secure. Thank you again for all the support and understanding.

reviews.text: I do not know the intention nor veracity of the negative reviews for Brian Nomi. I’ve been in real estate for almost 35 years as a builder, broker, and landlord. When I had tenant issues with my property in Ventura County I initially reached out to my legal contacts in L.A. They were not reassuring and just advised me to pay off the tenants as much as $30-$40k. I also reached out to Dennis Block’s office; I didn’t get a call back until four days later. I started calling Venture County attorneys and was referred to Brian Nomi. He was 100% reassuring of a positive outcome. He was very accessible and returned calls very quickly. Great defense attorney. Helped me get my felony charge dropped, then after being good for 6 months my misdemeanor charges were dropped too. Appeared for me at all my court dates so I didn't have to travel back to Ventura for every hearing. Took my case for HALF the amount that the LA lawyers wanted. Highly recommended.

I highly recommend Craig Murphy to anyone who has been in a car accident, especially if your family was involved. Our accident unfortunately happened on my teenage daughter’s birthday, which made the experience even more traumatic for her and our family. From the beginning, Craig treated our situation with care, patience, and professionalism.

He helped both my daughter and me find a great chiropractor who supported us throughout the entire recovery process and helped ease a lot of the pain we were dealing with. Craig was always quick to respond to our questions, took the time to explain every step of the process, and made sure we understood what was happening with our case. He was thoughtful in his approach—always listening first and providing clear guidance when we needed it.

What really stood out was how much he went above and beyond for our family. When the insurance company was giving us a hard time and delaying things like getting a rental car, Craig stepped in and made sure it was handled quickly so we didn’t have to keep dealing with the stress. That level of support made a huge difference during a difficult time.

Because of Craig, my family was able to focus on healing instead of constantly worrying about insurance problems and paperwork. He truly helped us get back on track. I’m very grateful for everything he did for us and would recommend him to anyone dealing with the aftermath of an accident.
reviews.ownerResponse:
George:
Thank you for your very kind words and appreciation. Fortunately, most people have never been injured in a car crash and have had to experience first hand the tactics used by insurance companies and adjusters. Often it is one road block after another all in an attempt to get you to go away or just give up. I am glad that we are able to stand up for people against the insurance companies that are motivated by one thing and one thing only; company profits. They do not want to take responsibility for the injuries caused by their insured's negligence and they try to make it as hard and as frustrating as possible as a means of wearing people down. Over many years of experience, we have developed a proven track records of standing up for people against these giant insurance companies and their unfair tactics. I am glad that we were able to help you and your family out.
Craig Murphy

reviews.text: WORST LAWYER IN TOWN, RUDE AND WILL WASTE YOUR TIME!!!
reviews.ownerResponse:
I have a law office where we pride ourselves on delivering outstanding client service and getting exceptional results for our clients. Up until this time, we had all 5 star reviews. If we were to receive a negative review we would take it very seriously and determine what needed to be fixed so that the problem that led to the negative review did not happen again. That is not the case with this review. This person is not a client of our firm and we never rendered any legal services to him. Instead, I responded to an advertisement he ran for web services. I requested that he make changes to the firm website. He provided a price quote and told us that he only accepted Venmo for payment. As a result, I informed him that I needed to set up a business Venmo account. He performed no work on my website and provided no services. He merely responded to two texts and two emails. Although I told him that I was waiting for my Venmo account to be set up, he provided this negative review without even asking me the status or following up.
I was not rude to this man and I did not waste his time. However, I can state that I will not be using his services.
My point for stating this is that we take legitimate reviews very seriously. Our goal is to provide our clients with the very best professional services. Unfortunately, I chose the wrong vendor to ask to perform services on my website. I will be more selective in the future. I also suggest that anyone reading this review and response who needs to hire a personal injury attorney also make sure that they hire the right attorney for your case. Call me and talk to me, you will be glad that you did. You will get personal attention, and we will treat you with dignity and respect, something that seems to often be missing these days.

reviews.text: If you need a personal injury lawyer look no further. You would be doing yourself a disservice if you do not hire Mr Murphy. We were dealing with an adjuster that would not communicate with us for nothing and Craig handled this perfectly and was able to get my case resolved as quick as it could have. I want to say thank you to Craig and his staff for a wonderful experience.
reviews.ownerResponse:
Brandon:
Thank you. Unfortunately, often times dealing with insurance adjusters is very difficult. It is what they are trained to do! Thank you for working so closely with us on your claim. As a result, we were able to get your claim resolved. I am also glad that the settlement will allow you to move so that you can get on with your life after this crash and your injuries. We wish you the best of success.

It is our goal to do what we can to help our clients. Every person is unique and we treat each of you as we would like to be treated if we were in your situation. We know that it can be very frustrating when the insurance adjuster takes a ridiculous position. However, that is why we stand up for our clients in these situations. If we did not, the insurance companies and their adjusters would steamroll innocent people who have been injured in car wrecks through no fault of their own. The insurance companies only concern is money and profits. Our concern is to make a difference in our clients' lives. We know that you appreciate that.

Thank you once again.

Craig Murphy

reviews.text:
I was looking for a lawyer to defend me in a lawsuit. I scrolled through google and found Murphy and Murphy Law.  I called and Craig immediately answered. He was kind and thoughtful. He had explained that he was a personal injury attorney and I needed a different attorney specializing in the type of law I needed. He went out of his way to spend 20 more minutes explaining what our next steps should be. Then he referred us to the perfect attorney for our situation. I know time is everything in his business. I am great full that there are attorneys who really care . Thanks again

reviews.ownerResponse:
Spencer & Scott:
Thank you for this kind review. I realize that most people have never had to hire a lawyer, so it is uncharted territory for them. Not every attorney is right for the needs of every client. That is particularly true in the area of personal injury law, which is what I do. Many lawyers who never handle personal injury cases take personal injury cases hoping that they can make some quick money. Unfortunately for the client, the inexperienced attorney messes up their claim and often a skilled and experienced attorney like me has to come in a clean up the mess. When someone needs legal representation, it is not a time for a lawyer to do "on the job training." Also, when someone like you has never had to hire an attorney before, it is very difficult for you to know who is a good attorney and who is not. Therefore, even when I get a call from someone with a case that is not in my area of expertise, I talk with you and try to get you to a skilled and experienced attorney who will be able to help you resolve your legal issue. I am glad that I was able to do that for you.
Craig Murphy

reviews.text: Craig Murphy and his firm did an excellent job handling a family member's insurance claim. They were professional, timely and informative. I would highly recommend their firm.
reviews.ownerResponse:
Eric:
Thank you for your confidence in us. I am glad that we were able to get a favorable result. As you found out, even when it appears that there is clear liability, many insurance companies will challenge liability and try to place responsibility on the injured person. When we prove the insurance company wrong, the insurance companies then challenge the injuries and damages. Once that is proven and we obtain the policy limits, the policy limits are often insufficient to compensate the injured person for all of their injuries and damages. We therefore have to engage in extensive negotiations to reduce the healthcare liens so that the injured person obtains compensation.
Thank you for your cooperation and assistance throughout this process. Also, thank you for taking the time in giving us this review. It is greatly appreciated.
Craig Murphy

reviews.text:
I can’t say enough great things about Laurie Peters and the experience my wife and I had working with her. She recently helped us update our living trust, and the entire process was smooth, thorough, and extremely professional.

Laurie took the time to explain everything clearly, answered all of our questions with patience, and made sure we fully understood our options before making any decisions. You can tell she truly cares about her clients and wants what’s best for their families — not just legally, but personally.

What really stands out is her integrity and attention to detail. Estate planning can feel overwhelming, but Laurie made it simple and gave us complete peace of mind knowing our family is protected.

If you’re looking for an attorney who is knowledgeable, trustworthy, and genuinely invested in her clients, I highly recommend Laurie Peters. Whether it’s estate planning, family law, or general legal guidance — she’s someone you want in your corner.

Great attorney.. highly recommended. She’s been representing me for 2+ years and wouldn’t go with anyone else. She’s the best. If you’re looking for someone sharp, caring and highly intelligent to handle your case, Laurie is the trusted go to.

Brian is AMAZING! He is attentive, empathetic and means business. I am so appreciative and grateful to have had him represent me with my dissolution of marriage. There is no need to look anywhere else.

I cannot express how thankful I am to Laurie Peters and Associates and Brian Horan for all their hard work, dedication, time and efforts into my case. Thank you for making this a smooth process, during a stressful time. I’m appreciative and happy with the outcome.

Mrs. Peters has been a real blessing during such a stressful anxiety ridden stage in my life. I had two previous attorneys that can’t hold a candle to Laurie and her abilities. I was referred by a friend, who had another friend rave about Laurie, so I took a third shot at representation and I’m so glad I did. I was very jaded with the courts and specifically my counsel. I came in very skeptical and she went to work and changed my outlook.

On a personal level her concern, respect, morality and genuine nature has been a huge breath of fresh air.

On a professional level she truly upholds her oath to zealously represent her client. Effective, honest, extremely well versed in her legal field, confident, responsive, and her openness to discussion are a testament to her professionalism.

I’d like to take this time to thank Laurie Peters, directly/specifically, as well as her incredible staff in Camarillo at Laurie Peters and associates.

I highly recommend Mrs. Peters and her team !!

Sincerely-
Jon Lang

Ms. Peters was the answer to my prayers at a time when my options appeared limited, and the likelihood of a satisfactory resolution seemed almost impossible.  My family and I are eternally grateful for her service.  I recommend Ms. Peters without reservation.

Divorce is one of the worst and unfortunate event that can happen to any body. when anybody goes through this emotional and uncertain event, we need someone that can tell you everything you need to know. It is my experience to learn the good, bad and ugly part of the divorce.  I am extremely happy that I had someone like Laurie on my side to guide me through this difficult time.  She represent me with the highest degree of integrity and fight for me to stage my case to a successful ending. I highly recommend Laurie to be on your side during this difficult divorce time. You will appreciate her hard work and calm personality.

Laurie Peters is an incredible attorney. She made it known that my individual case mattered to her, and kept my child’s best interest in mind at all times. She advocated for me and my abilities as a mom, despite my disability. Her entire firm believed in me and put in the hard work to assure my baby was able to come home to me, and live a healthy and balanced life. She’s timely, intelligent, and responsive. She’s been so kind while also maintaining professionalism and efficiency. Laurie is overall amazing at her job and I highly recommend her.

Ms. Peters really came through for me! I've been stuck living with a horrible person who harasses me constantly since the pandemic stay-home orders were instituted. I finally had enough and sought help from Ms. Peters. She saw me right away, filed the paperwork, and had Blaine (one of her staff attorneys) go through the court process. The courts sound a little bit disorganized right now with all the closures and shuffling of personnel, but Blaine made sure my TRO request was pushed through. It still stinks that the person couldn't be asked to move out as part of the TRO, but this is a big step in the right direction.

Before I called the Law Offices of Laurie Peters, I was  a stay-at-home mom trying to navigate a divorce on my own. When disagreements between my ex-spouse and myself arose, his attorney began to pursue me aggressively. I desperately needed an expert to work on my behalf.

I contacted numerous law offices and asked around for recommended attorneys. A trusted friend referred me to Laurie Peters. When I met Laurie, I felt immediate relief. She was empathetic, knowledgeable, and full of sound advice. She helped put me at ease.

Laurie herself advocated on my case and set matters straight. In the end, my ex fired his attorney and we collaborated to form a mutual agreement with the aid of Laurie's staff. With their guidance, my ex and I were able to come to a fair agreement in the best interest of the children and the whole family.

I am very grateful to Laurie Peters for helping me get through my divorce, and I highly recommend her services. Five stars all the way.

Laurie Peters is an excellent attorney, her dedication and common-sense approach to family law issues gets you the results you deserve. She clearly explained all of the steps and procedures that need to be taken to move forward with the case. Laurie is competent and shrewd. She will not backdown. She always places the client's best interests first and foremost. She truly takes an interest in the overall well-being of the family and the children involved.

Attorney Peters is a zealous advocate, always prepared and on top of her game to fight for her clients. She is a powerhouse! Attorney Peters is knowledgeable and presents herself as very confident when dealing with the other party's attorney. She never backs down from confrontations. She is able to "get to the point", in order to get results. I can attest that she is serious, dedicated, diligent and compassionate.

She assured me she would stick by my side and help. They all did, the team at Laurie Peters Law Offices. You will not find a more talented, dedicated, ethical, smart or empathetic attorney!

Dedication and common-sense approaches to your family law issues to get the results you deserve.

Laurie Peters was a miracle worker. I never thought I would get to  move out of California after I received an opportunity with my job.  She was able to get my custody order modified quickly and answered all my calls and questions promptly.  I highly recommend Laurie and her team for any of your custody needs.

Laurie and Blaine never gave up.  They fought for me, giving me back my dignity and respect!  Thank you for your excellent work!

Let me start by sharing just a little bit of my story. My girlfriend had a stroke three years ago and I’m a full-time caregiver. I got in the habit of having two or three glasses of wine every night just as a reward. So the afternoon of my DUI, January 4, 2025 Kathy had spent the week at her daughter‘s house and I went to the Burbank airport to pick her up. I got there early, so I stopped at a restaurant had something to eat and had two classes wine. I went to the airport, apparently I walked past a security guard Smelled alcohol on me. He went to the Burbank security guards at the airport and told them  that he smelled alcohol on me.  As I was putting Kathy in the car, they walked up to me and said “Can we talk to you”. Of course, I said sure. The story from there is they arrested me and I spent the night in jail! Completely humiliating on top of that I had to leave Kathy at the airport and somehow she got a ride home the next day I called my attorney friend Dan Spitzer, and he referred me to Tal. At a time of feeling guilty irresponsible and humiliated Tal was there to support me. The first thing that he did was to win my DMV hearing I got no restrictions to my drivers license. I did not have to put a blow device in my car and that was fantastic. Tal communicated with me all along the way, I knew nothing about this process. He gave me the greatest degree of self-confidence that it was gonna be OK!
Today we went to court and because of Tal‘s referral to Dr. Pilar and her letter that she wrote to the court I was granted a two year Military deferment Program that has multiple requirements by me, And alcohol treatment program, and quarterly check-in with the court. I’ve not been convicted and if I do the program correctly after two years, the chargers will be expunged from my record. I want to say again a big thanks to Tal for helping me through this really stressful time. I hope you’ll not drink and drive! If you do call Tal!

I hired Mr. Jarrod Wilfert for a DUI with injury case. This case was over two years old and even though I originally was told, I passed the sobriety test and did not get a DUI for some reason they decided to bring it back. Keep in mind, I had made several complaints about the police department, ignoring restraining order and allowing me to be abused. I had all the evidence to show not only was I assaulted that same month which is why I tested positive for a medication. They didn’t decide to bring the charge back because I got an evading police charge because I have PTSD Which had already been communicated with the police department many times. I did not evade the police. I let the car roll forward while having a panic attack. I tried to make that case for the police Evasion case Which should’ve been allowed because I really did have a mental health diagnose That I had been treated for four I had proof that I dealt with Negligence from the police and I put in reports. Nobody cared they wouldn’t let me make those arguments and they let me get a conviction which made them review the dui Decide to charge me. I had proof that I was assaulted that same month that I put in a complaint to the police department because the police who responded was friends with my ex who was my abuser. I also had proof that my car was rear-ended just a couple weeks before, and I took it into a mechanic who said that if it continued to Have break problems To bring it in, I had text messages with the owner of the car telling him that I thought I needed to bring it back in. I was on my way to the mechanic when the accident happened. I passed a sobriety test, and my roommate was with me when I passed it But for some reason, two years later during court They changed it And it said I did not pass. These were all viable arguments I could’ve brought in front of a jury But was advised not to because Mr. Wilfert told me he believed I could get it reduced to a misdemeanor, And from what I understand that would’ve this dismissed The whole case. While going through all this, I had to watch my abusive ex get hate crime And then get them dismiss due to mental health problems. Which he only saw because he was court ordered too, But as a woman who deals with a real medical condition and pays out-of-pocket for my my treatments Wasn’t the same treatment within my own community because apparently I’m a bad woman who needs to take a accountability. Besides all this There was several mistakes made with my case. For some reason, the police were very eager to have me go into the jails, So I was requesting house arrest, especially because of Covid. Mr. Wilford receptionist told me she was sending in the paperwork, right away. But after contacting the sheriffs department, I found out the paperwork was never turned in, I had to fill out the paperwork myself And turn it in last minute. If I didn’t persistently I would’ve had to go into the jails at one of the most dangerous times during Covid. Months later, I had texted Mr. Wilford because he told me to text him anytime, I texted him four times in one month Because the judge told me if I did everything within months, He would reduce the charge to a misdemeanor And get me off probation. So I was excited and I was texting him trying to get information on meeting up to discuss this. He never responded and you see me get concerned as if I thought something happened to him. Instead of getting a professional response and being allowed to be informed on my case and get help, I had the receptionist contact me getting… FULL REVIEW IN PHOTOS

reviews.ownerResponse:
Dear Ms. Castillo,

I am sorry you are feeling so frustrated. I care very much about my clients including your son.

I think anytime we have loved ones, especially our children, who get caught up in the criminal justice system the entire process can be overwhelming.

In the juvenile justice system, we do not enjoy the same procedural safeguards present in the adult court and in fact, it is the Judge relying on information provided by Defense Counsel, the Prosecutor and Probation who determines what he or she believes is in the best interest of the minor. This is true even when the Judge's opinion is not what the parents desire. I can understand how frustrating this can be.

I had been asking my secretaries to have you come in to talk to me directly and I know they have been reaching out to you for some time now.

Why don't you give us a call and come sit down with me face to face? I would be happy to clear some time and walk you through the discovery and listen to your questions and hopefully answer them to the best of my ability.

I know this situation has been stressful for you, I'd like to try and make it better.

Dealing with a DUI in Ventura can be an overwhelming sensation, especially when it comes to choosing legal representation.  Looking at the letters in my mailbox was like looking at a box of crayons, with seemingly limitless options and no idea where to start.  Then, at the suggestion of a close family member, I decided to take the plunge with Wilfert Law, and never have I felt so confident and satisfied with a decision this important.

Jarrod, Marlene, Ros, and everyone else on the team have been some of the most pleasant people I have ever had the pleasure of knowing, and have somehow turned this experience into one that I will look back on positively.  Their expertise and professionalism come at no cost to their friendliness and caring attitudes.  Being completely new to legal matters, I never felt as though I was coming off as a liability to them, and they have helped me learn so much about how to deal with these situations.

It is rare to find exactly what you're looking for in the first place that you look.  However, if you're looking for a representative and don't know where to go, there is no better place to start than Wilfert Law, and I don't see myself going anywhere else.

Had multiple ads sent in the mail to me after my 1st (and only) DUI. By far the Wilfert Law package stood out. Extremely professional, seemed almost too good to be true. Interviewed with several different law firms before choosing Jarrod and his team. Best decision, hands down. The whole team is very helpful. Never any issues getting updates or trying to contact them. I never had to show up for court. Always kept me up to speed and let me know what steps I needed to take in order to get the whole situation handled. They fought hard to try and bring my charges down to wet and reckless due to my levels being 0.082. But being Ventura county it just doesn't happen. But he was able to make it so I did not have to serve any jail time. Biggest help is that they were able to get me completely off of probation after 12 months instead of me serving the 18 that I was sentenced. Last rung on this ladder is to get it expunged from my record which Jarrod and his team are already planning out. Bottom line is, if you need a lawyer, this is the place to go. You won't have a better experience with anyone else.
Jarrod is very professional,  He takes pride at what he does. Best Lawyer in Ventura county

I felt God was watching over for me after I had a meeting with Jarrod. Since this was my first time looking for a lawyer I called many lawyer for a consultation. They all seemed to be more focused on their own profit and demanded the service fee upfront. But Jarrod was different from all of them.  I felt his best interest was truly helping me. he was very knowledgeable, professional for my misdemeanor case. He contacted my district attorney right away and gave me an option to take a class and now I don’t even have to go to the court. I m so thankful for Jarrod and wish we have more lawyers like him. I saved so much money and time because of him. You won’t regret letting him handle your case. He is amazing at what he does and he has a great heart. I am so grateful for him and will recommend him to all my family and friends.

I used Mr wilfert for my dui, I got exactly the results I wanted. No jail time and he continued to help me with follow up court cases for no extra charge. I'd recommend him to anyone facing dui charges

reviews.text:
If you are seeking legal representation for a workers’ compensation or personal injury case, I strongly recommend contacting Deirdre Frank’s law firm. Their professionalism, expertise, and dedication to their clients set them apart in the field. The initial consultation comes at no cost, and from the moment you walk through their doors, you are treated with the respect and compassion you deserve.

In California, the standard attorney fee for workers’ compensation cases is 15% of the final settlement. While some specialized cases—such as extreme injuries or wrongful death—may require additional legal considerations, Deirdre Frank’s firm has successfully handled such complex cases, securing critical care and fair settlements for injured individuals and their families. Given that the base fee remains the same across firms, the choice is clear—why not work with the best?

For me, hiring Deirdre Frank’s law firm was a game-changer. Before securing their representation, I faced constant interference from my employer and insurance adjusters, dictating my medical care and limiting my options. After making the call to their office, all of that noise disappeared. I was finally able to focus on my recovery, knowing I had a trusted team advocating for me. That peace of mind was invaluable.

It is widely recognized that clients represented by experienced law firms receive better medical care, more thorough case management, and fairer settlements than those who try to navigate the process alone. The exceptional legal skill and compassionate approach of Deirdre Frank’s team make all the difference. If you or a loved one need workers’ compensation or personal injury representation, I urge you to make the call—you deserve the best.
Absolutely great attorneys and support staff. Always answer questions in a timely manner, and explain everything in very clear manner.

Deirdre Frank was wonderful in handling my case. She came to meet me when I was too injured to commute. She was knowledgeable, thorough and patient, explained the process in detail and kept me informed at every stage of the case. She worked hard to get me the best settlement possible and her legaI assistant Jeannette always helped keep the line of communication open. I would definitely recommend her.

reviews.text: She was amazing and went far and beyond to help me when I needed it most. Worth every penny!

Viktoria was great at guiding me through one of the most stressful times.  She was reassuring and made me feel very comfortable through the whole process of my divorce.
Thank you for your guidance and comfort.

Viktoria did in 4 months what my first lawyer couldn't do in a year and a half.  She listened to my concerns and addressed them.  She didn't let my soon to be ex and his bully attorney run all over me like the first attorney had.  She documented my husbands behavior and got him to get things done.  And because things were actually getting done, it is going to cost me half of what the other lawyer had charged me.  Wish I had started with her to begin with.

Being self-represented in Family Court, I reached out to Viktoria for a consultation on analyzing the issues in my case and developing a strategy to present in court.  Viktoria understood the challenge before me and helped me frame my argument before the judge.  Viktoria kept me focused on the issues and pointed out a discrepancy in the judge’s Tentative Ruling (TR) that I did not notice.  Viktoria coached me on how to address the discrepancy and how to phrase my issue to get the judge’s attention.  Thanks to Viktoria’s coaching, the judge completely removed that portion of the TR.  Viktoria also helped me frame my overall presentation on the other remaining issues such that I could tell the judge was seriously considering what I was saying.  Without Viktoria’s coaching, my presentation before the judge would not have been as successful.  Viktoria was also helpful in referring me to the appropriate Family Law codes for my further review and growth.  I appreciate Viktoria’s patience, and understanding in seeing me through this, and her sense of humor is a plus.

Viktoria helped my daughter recoup funds stolen in a Family Trust scam. Noelle had struggled with this family betrayal for years, and another attorney had not fought for her the way Viktoria did. There are many choices for Attorneys, but Viktoria goes above and beyond in her efforts to achieve justice and what is fair. We felt completely at ease under Viktoria’s legal expertise and we achieved all that Noelle deserved in her settlement. We will always turn to Viktoria for future legal needs.
I was in an accident 4 years ago he keeps telling him he will call me back and never does.

When I first met him, he seemed competent , after we signed for his services ,not so much, it took him 2 years to close a minor car accident. I ended up doing half of the work, or it still wouldn't be closed .When you call ,it goes to his Voicemail ,which is always full. The most unprofessional person I have ever dealt with.   I would hire a monkey before hiring him.

This in real time as he is my attorney right now. He seemed very confident before I signed and now I get excuses, and blindsided with standard Car accident issues I would think any practicing lawyer would have seen coming a mile away. I am however, giving him the benefit of the doubt and will wait a little longer before having "That Talk"

reviews.text: Sua Law is unmatched for their efficiency, professionalism and dedication to their clients.  They receive my highest recommendation.

Brandon Sua spent 8 years. 8 years fighting tyrants, corpupt DA, crooked cops. Double felonies! 8 years! And today we won. It's over. They are all gone and my life is back to normal! B SUA is the absolute best person I ever could have had have my back! 📸 Pic of dismissed case on their photos!

After speaking with several attorneys about my situation, I was honestly starting to feel discouraged. Each lawyer I contacted seemed quick to make excuses for the landlord I was trying to sue, and I didn’t feel heard or supported. That completely changed when I spoke with Lenelle Castille Law Office.

From our very first conversation, Mrs. Castille made me feel like she was truly on my side. She listened carefully, validated my concerns, and approached my case with confidence and determination. For the first time, I felt like someone genuinely believed in my position and was willing to fight for me.

The entire process was very stressful and anxiety-inducing for me, but she never left me feeling alone. She held my hand every step of the way — answering my questions, checking in frequently, and even emailing me multiple times throughout the day to keep me updated and reassured. Her support meant more than I can put into words.

Mrs. Castille is not only knowledgeable and professional, but also compassionate and deeply committed to her clients. If you want an attorney who will stand firmly by your side and advocate for you with dedication and care, I highly recommend her.

I recently worked with Lenelle Castille Law Office for my business needs, and I couldn’t be more pleased with the experience. Lenelle is extremely professional, knowledgeable, and truly dedicated to her clients. She has a strong “go-get” attitude and approaches everything with confidence and determination.

What stood out to me most was her patience and willingness to take the time to explain things clearly. She made sure I understood every step of the process and never made me feel rushed. Her attention to detail and commitment to getting things done right gave me a lot of peace of mind.

If you’re looking for an attorney who is responsive, thorough, and genuinely cares about her clients and their businesses, I highly recommend Lenelle Castille Law Office.
Lenelle was fast to call me back after my initial inquiry and she has been very helpful. Thank you, Lenelle!

Lenelle represented myself and my family perfectly. We ran into an issue where we signed a contract for solar with a company that eventually lost it's license to work in the state of CA. She helped me identify who I should reach out to in order to complete the solar install project. She was able to help negotiate a deal for us to receive compensation and an additional battery to our system at no additional cost. She was very responsive and professional throughout the whole process.

I was able to ask her questions regarding the contracts that were signed and she promptly responded with an explanation that was easy to understand. She reviewed and helped revise contracts that were sent our way as well.

I would absolutely recommend Lenelle and her law office to anyone looking for a professional & competent representative.

reviews.text:
With such a confusing and ridiculous court system, you need support and knowledge how to navigate it. You could be doing all the “right” things and still not see “results” you’re seeking. Because ultimately you’ll always be leading with your heart and stuck in your own perspective. So having someone who has an outside perspective, and deals with a multitude of court proceedings daily, really becomes the help you’ve needed. And although no attorney can guarantee certain outcomes, Cynthia will absolutely have your back.
Her professionalism, confidence, and pure compassion will surely put you at ease. She is quick to comfort and is either already in constant contact or will easily be available for whatever you need. She has a wonderful staff, Sereth and Christina, who also extend their support and are so warm-hearted.

Working with Cynthia was such a huge blessing to me and my daughters, who still ask to see/talk to her often. Cynthia is so incredibly kind and she’s passionate about what she’s doing, carrying on a beautiful legacy that was set before her so graciously. I have nothing but praiseful things to say about her and could truly go on forever.
You hold such a special place in my heart always, Cynthia. Thank you.
reviews.ownerResponse: Helping you was our absolute pleasure. I appreciate your trust and confidence in our ability to provide you with the help that you and your family needed. I am grateful for the time that we spent together and I appreciate your review.

reviews.text: Cynthia Gonzales and her staff are amazing. I was so grateful when we all came into the first meeting with my sister and father. I recommend The Law Office of Cynthia Gonzales to anyone who is in need of a family lawyer or even if you had a question of who you should speak to she would direct you to that person. She goes over and beyond.
